_meta.mechanism: Boron module 腳本字面(非 u4read_stringtable / 非硬編 C 字面)
_meta.note: en = Boron 字面解碼後文字;zh 待填。佔位符 @ % $ # = $gp 翻譯時保留。

strings.en:
How many =s
would you wish
to sell?
strings.zh:
汝欲售出
幾件 =
呢?

strings.en:
I will give you $gp for that =.
Deal?
strings.zh:
這 = 我願出 $gp 收購。
成交否？

strings.en:
I will give you $gp for them.
Deal?
strings.zh:
這些我願出 $gp 收購。
成交否?

strings.en: You don't have that many swine!
You have not the funds for even one!
strings.zh: 汝之金幣連一件都不夠！

strings.en:
Unfortunately, I have but only a very small room with 1 bed:
                worse yet, it's haunted! If you do wish to stay it costs 5gp.
strings.zh:
可惜，我這只剩一間極小的房，僅有一床：
                更糟的是，那兒鬧鬼！汝若仍願留宿，需付 5 金幣。

strings.en:
% says: Ah, the Black Stone.
            Yes I've heard of it. But, the
            only one who knows where it
            lies is the wizard Merlin.
strings.zh:
% 道：啊，那黑石。
            是的，我曾聽聞。然而，
            唯一知曉它藏身何處者，
            乃是巫師梅林。

strings.en: % says: For navigation a Sextant is vital... Ask for item "D" in the Guild shops!
strings.zh: % 道:航行少不得六分儀…到行會鋪子問「D」號貨色!

strings.en:
% says: If thou must know of that evilest of all things...
            find the beggar Jude. He is very very poor!
strings.zh:
% 說道：汝若定要探知那萬惡之最……
            去尋那乞丐裘德。他窮苦至極！

strings.en:
% says: Of Nightshade I know but this...
            Seek out Virgil or thou shalt miss! Try in Trinsic!
strings.zh:
% 道：論夜影，我所知唯此……
            汝當尋維吉爾，否則錯失良機！可往特林希克一試！

strings.en:
% says: The last person I knew that had
            any Mandrake was an old alchemist
            named Calumny.
strings.zh:
% 道:我所知最後一個藏有
            曼陀羅根的,是個喚作
            卡倫尼的老鍊金師。

strings.en:
A blind woman turns to you and says: Welcome to @

            I am %
            Are you in need of Reagents?
strings.zh:
一名盲眼婦人轉身向汝說道：歡迎光臨 @

            我是 %
            汝可需要施法材料？

strings.en:
Avast ye mate! Shure ye wishes to buy from ol'
%?

            % says: Welcome to @.
Like to see my goods?
strings.zh:
且慢，夥計！汝當真欲向老
% 採買？

            % 道：歡迎光臨 @。
欲一覽我的貨色否？

strings.en:
Flasks of oil make great weapons and creates a wall of flame too.
            $gp each.
strings.zh:
油瓶是上好的武器,還能燒出一道火牆。
            每瓶 $gp。

strings.en:
Leather Armour is both supple and strong, and costs a mere $gp.
            A Bargain!
strings.zh:
皮甲既柔韌又堅固，僅售 $gp。
            真是划算！

strings.en:
Magical swords such as these are rare indeed
            I will part with one for $gp.
strings.zh:
這般魔法之劍，實屬罕見，
            我願以 $gp 割愛其一。

strings.en:
Now let me see... Yes it was the old Hermit...
            Sloven! He is tough to find,
            lives near Lock Lake I hear.
strings.zh:
待我想想…對了,是那老隱士…
            斯洛文!此人難尋,
            聽聞住在洛克湖畔。

strings.en:
Our slings are made from only the finest guy and leather,
            'Tis yours for $gp.
strings.zh:
我們的投石索皆取上等繩索與皮革製成，
            $gp 即歸汝所有。

strings.en:
Welcome to
            @

            % says:
            Welcome friend!
            Art thou here to
            Buy or Sell?
strings.zh:
歡迎光臨
            @

            % 道：
            歡迎，朋友！
            汝此來是欲
            購買還是售出？

strings.en:
Welcome to
            @

            % says:
            Welcome friend!
            Want to Buy or
            Sell?
strings.zh:
歡迎光臨
            @

            % 道:
            歡迎,朋友!
            欲買還是
            欲賣?

strings.en:
Welcome unto
            @

            % says:
            Peace and Joy be with you friend.
            Are you in need of help?
strings.zh:
歡迎來到
            @

            % 說道：
            願安寧與喜樂與汝同在，朋友。
            汝可需要醫治？

A-解毒
        B-治癒
        C-復活

strings.en:
A-Sulfurous Ash
        B-Ginseng
        C-Garlic
        D-Spider Silk
        E-Blood Moss
        F-Black Pearl
strings.zh:
A-硫磺灰
        B-人蔘
        C-大蒜
        D-蜘蛛絲
        E-血苔
        F-黑珍珠

A-火把
        B-魔法寶石
        C-魔法鑰匙

strings.en: % asks: Do you need more help?

strings.zh:
% 說道：
祝汝一路平安！

strings.en:
% says:
Perhaps another time then....
and slowly turns away.
strings.zh:
% 道:
那便改日再說吧….
說罷緩緩轉身離去。

strings.en:
% says: Good Mate!
Ya see I gots:
+Wat'l it be?
strings.zh:
% 道：好夥計！
汝瞧我這有：
+欲要哪樣？

strings.en: % says: May thy life be guarded by the powers of good.
strings.zh: % 說道：願良善之力護佑汝之性命。

strings.en: % says: Sorry, you seem to have too many. Bye!
strings.zh: % 說道：抱歉，汝似乎已持有過多。再會！

strings.en:
% says: Then you have come to the wrong place!
Good day.
strings.zh:
% 道：那汝可來錯地方了！
告辭。

strings.en: % says: What'll it be, Food er Ale?
strings.zh: % 說道：要點什麼，食物還是麥酒？

strings.en: 'fraid I can't help ya there friend!
strings.zh: 抱歉，這事我可幫不上汝，朋友！

strings.en: A shame, thou looks like thou could use a good horse!
strings.zh: 真可惜，汝看來正需要一匹好馬呢！

strings.en: Art thou willing to give 100pts of thy blood to aid others?
strings.zh: 汝可願獻出汝之百點鮮血，以濟他人？

strings.en: Come back when you have some money!

Come on, you
don't own any.
strings.zh:
別鬧了，汝
根本一件也沒有。

甚好！汝欲要
哪一樣

strings.en:
For only $g.p.
Thou can have the best! Wilt thou buy?
strings.zh:
僅需 $g.p.
汝即可擁有最佳之物！汝願購買嗎？

strings.en:
Here's a mug of our best.
That'll be 2gp.
You pay?
strings.zh:
這是我們最好的一杯。
要價 2 金幣。
汝付帳嗎？

strings.en: Here, a better breed thou shalt not find ever!
strings.zh: 喏，這般良駒，汝再難尋得！

strings.en: How many packs of # would you like?

How many plates would you
like?
I can give ya # long lasting Torches for a mere $gp.
strings.zh: 我可給汝 # 支耐久火把，僅需 $gp。

strings.en: I fear you have not the funds, perhaps something else.
strings.zh: 恐怕汝囊中羞澀，或許看看別樣。

strings.en: I see by thy purse that thou hast not enough gold. I cannot aid thee.
strings.zh: 我瞧汝錢袋，知汝金幣不足。我無法相助。

strings.en: I've got magical mapping Gems, # for only $gp.
strings.zh: 我有魔法測繪寶石,# 顆只需 $gp。

strings.en: If you can't pay, you can't stay! Good Bye.
strings.zh: 付不起就別想留宿！再會。

strings.en: It seems that you have not the gold. Good Day!
It seems thou hast not gold enough to pay!
strings.zh: 汝囊中金幣似乎不足支付!

strings.en: It seems you have not the gold!
Magical Keys, 1 use each, a fair price at $gp for #.
strings.zh: 魔法鑰匙，一把一用，# 把僅售 $gp，價格公道。

strings.en: May I interest you in some rations?
Oh, and don't mind the strange noises, it's only rats!
strings.zh: 喔，別在意那些怪聲，不過是老鼠罷了！

strings.en: So...Ya want a Sextant...Well I gots one which I might part with fer $ gold!
strings.zh: 哦…汝要六分儀…嗯,我這兒有一具,$ 金幣便可割愛!

strings.en:
Sorry, I could
not help ya mate!
strings.zh:
抱歉，老兄，我
幫不上忙！

strings.en:
That subject is a bit foggy, perhaps more gold will refresh my memory. You
give:
strings.zh:
此事我記得模糊,多些金幣或許能喚醒我的記性。汝
付:

strings.en: Thou art a great help. We are in dire need!
strings.zh: 汝乃莫大的幫助。我等正急需相助！

strings.en: Thou dost not own that. What else might
Very good, that will be $gp.  You pay:

Very good.  Have
a pleasant night.
strings.zh:
很好。願汝
一夜安眠。

strings.en:
Very well, we sell = for $gp. How many would you
like?
strings.zh:
好,= 我等售價 $gp。汝欲要
幾件?

strings.en: We have the best adventure rations, # for only $gp.
strings.zh: 本店備有最上等的冒險口糧，# 份僅售 $gp。

strings.en:
We have three rooms available,
a 1, 2 and 3 bed room for 30, 60
and 90gp each.
1, 2 or 3
beds?
strings.zh:
我等有三種客房,
一、二、三床房分別為 30、60
與 90gp。
要 1、2 還是 3
床?

我們有：
+
要選
哪樣？

strings.en: What'd ya like to know friend?
What? Can't pay! Buzz off swine!

Won't pay, eh.
Ya scum, be gone
fore ey call the
guards!
strings.zh:
不付帳，是吧。
汝這敗類，趁我還沒
喚衛兵之前，快
滾！

strings.en: You don't have enough gold. Maybe something cheaper?
strings.zh: 汝的金幣不夠。或許要點便宜些的？

strings.en: You won't find a better deal in this towne!
strings.zh: 在這鎮上，汝再尋不著更划算的買賣了！

strings.en: A Halberd is a mighty weapon to attack over obstacles; a must and only $gp.
strings.zh: 戟乃強力武器,可越障攻敵;必備之選,只需 $gp。

strings.en: A magical bow will keep thy enemies far away or dead! A must for $gp!
strings.zh: 魔法弓能令汝之敵遠遁或斃命!必備之選,$gp!

strings.en: All we have is that cot over there. But it is comfortable, and only 1 gp.
strings.zh: 我們只剩那邊那張行軍床。不過甚是舒適，僅需 1 金幣。

strings.en: Chail Mail is the armour used by more warriors than all others. Ours costs $gp.
strings.zh: 鎖子甲乃眾武者最常用之護甲。我等售價 $gp。

strings.en: Cloth Armour is good for a tight budget, Fairly priced at $gp.
strings.zh: 布甲適合手頭拮据者,價格公道,$gp。

strings.en: Crossbows made by Iolo the Bard are the finest in the world, your for $gp.
strings.zh: 吟遊詩人尤洛所製弩弓乃天下第一,$gp 即歸汝所有。

strings.en: Full Plate armour is the ultimate in non-magical armour. Get yours for $gp.
strings.zh: 全身板甲乃非魔法護甲之極品。$gp 即可入手。

strings.en: Get that horse out of here!!!
Magic Armour is rare and expensive. This chain sells for $gp.
strings.zh: 魔法護甲罕見而昂貴。這副鎖子甲售 $gp。

strings.en: Magic Plate Armour is the best known protection. Only we have it.  Cost: $gp.
strings.zh: 魔法板甲乃眾所周知最佳的防護。唯本店有售。  價：$gp。

strings.en: Notice the fine workmanship on this axe, you'll agree $gp is a good price.
strings.zh: 且看這斧的精工細作,汝定會認同 $gp 是個好價錢。

strings.en: Our bows are made of finest yew, and the arrows willow, a steal at $gp.
strings.zh: 本店之弓以上等紫杉木製成，箭桿取自柳木，$gp 實屬撿便宜。

strings.en: The fine work on these swords will be the dread of thy foes, for $gp.
strings.zh: 這些刀劍工藝精良，必令汝之敵聞風喪膽，僅售 $gp。

strings.en: These maces have a hardened shaft and a 5lb head fairly priced at $gp.
strings.zh: 這些釘頭錘柄身堅硬，錘頭重五磅，售 $gp，價格公道。

strings.en: This magic wand casts mighty blue bolts to strike down thy foes, $gp.
strings.zh: 此魔杖可施放強力藍色閃電,擊倒汝之仇敵,$gp。

strings.en: This magical axe can be thrown at thy enemy and will then return all for $gp.
strings.zh: 此魔法戰斧可擲向汝之敵，擲出後又會飛回，盡歸汝有，僅售 $gp。

strings.en: We are the only staff makers in Britannia, yet sell them for only $gp.
strings.zh: 我等乃不列顛尼亞唯一的法杖匠人,卻只售 $gp。

strings.en: We have a modest sized room with 1 bed for 15 gp.
strings.zh: 我們有一間中等大小、附一床的房，售 15 金幣。

strings.en: We have a room with 2 beds that rents for 20gp.
strings.zh: 本店有一間雙床房，租金 20 金幣。

strings.en: We have a single bed room with a back door for 15gp.
strings.zh: 我等有間附後門的單人房,15gp。

strings.en: We have a very secure room of modest size and 1 bed for 10gp.
strings.zh: 我們有一間十分安全、中等大小、附一床的房，售 10 金幣。

strings.en: We sell the most deadly of daggers, a bargain at only $gp each.
strings.zh: 本店出售最致命的匕首，每把僅 $gp，划算之至。

strings.en:
Welcome friend!
Can I interest thee in
horses?
strings.zh:
歡迎,朋友!
汝可有意添置
馬匹?

strings.en:
Welcome to @

% says: Good day, and Welcome friend.
strings.zh:
歡迎光臨 @

% 說道：日安，歡迎汝，朋友。

strings.en:
Welcome to @

I am %.

Are you in need of lodging?
strings.zh:
歡迎光臨 @

我乃 %。

汝可需投宿？
